'''''Troll Magazine'' 2''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1998]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Centripetal Drive]]," and was written by [[Floyd Wesel|Floyd C. Wesel]].

==Release and reception==
Issue #0 of [[Eclipse Studios]]' ''[[Troll Magazine]]'' was released at [[Gen Con Game Fair]] and the magazine was announced in a [[November]] issue of [[InQuest Gamer]] by [[Tom Slzewski]]<ref name="T1">''Troll Magazine'' 1</ref> however the magazine series was cancelled after issue #3.
